name: accordion
title: Accordion
description: Vertically stacked sections that expand/collapse, built on Radix UI.

name: ai-chat
title: AI Chat Interface
description: Full-featured AI chat UI with message bubbles, model selector, copy button, and typing indicator.

name: alert
title: Alert
description: Inline alert banner with default, info, success, warning, and destructive variants.

name: alert-dialog
title: Alert Dialog
description: Confirmation dialog with accessible labelling. Blocks interaction until dismissed.

name: animate-in
title: Animate In
description: Versatile viewport-triggered entrance animation wrapper. 7 variants: fade, slide-up/down/left/right, scale, rotate.

name: animated-beam
title: Animated Beam
description: SVG curved beam that animates between two ref'd elements. Used to visualise data flow in hero sections. Configurable curvature, speed, gradient colors, and direction.

name: animated-list
title: Animated List
description: Staggered slide-up + fade-in entrance for list children. Configurable delay between items.

name: aurora-background
title: Aurora Background
description: Slow-moving blurred blob aurora background with configurable palette, speed, and blur radius. Wraps any content.

name: auth
title: Auth Flow
description: Sign-in, sign-up, forgot-password, and verify-email screens stitched together. Ready to wire to your auth provider.

name: auth-forgot-password
title: Auth — Forgot Password
description: Forgot password form with email input and reset link send confirmation.

name: auth-sign-in
title: Auth — Sign In
description: Sign-in form with email/password, Google/GitHub social buttons, and forgot password link.

name: auth-sign-up
title: Auth — Sign Up
description: Sign-up form with name, email, password, terms checkbox, and social login options.

name: auth-verify-email
title: Auth — Verify Email
description: Email verification screen with resend link and success state.

name: avatar
title: Avatar
description: Circular avatar with image, fallback initials, and electric ring variant.

name: badge
title: Badge
description: Inline status badge with five variants including electric accent.

name: badge-shine
title: Badge Shine
description: Status badge with an automatic shining light sweep. Three variants: default, pro, and new. Pure CSS.

name: beam
title: Beam
description: Animated light beam that slides across a 1px separator line. Configurable color, speed, and delay.

name: bento-grid
title: Bento Grid
description: Asymmetric bento-style feature grid with spotlight hover effect on each card.

name: blog
title: Blog
description: Blog index with header, hero, article list with author avatars, newsletter section, and footer.

name: blur-fade
title: Blur Fade
description: Viewport-triggered entrance animation: blurs out then fades in smoothly. Zero dependencies, respects prefers-reduced-motion.

name: border-beam
title: Border Beam
description: Rotating conic-gradient border that sweeps around any container. Configurable colors, speed, and border width.

name: breadcrumb
title: Breadcrumb
description: Accessible breadcrumb navigation with separator, ellipsis, and current page slots.

name: button
title: Button
description: Accessible button with six variants and electric-glow on the default variant.

name: calendar
title: Calendar
description: Full-featured calendar picker built on react-day-picker with ParticleUI styling.

name: card
title: Card
description: Composable card with header, content, and footer slots.

name: checkbox
title: Checkbox
description: Checkbox with electric fill and smooth check animation.

name: combobox
title: Combobox
description: Searchable select built by combining Command inside a Popover.

name: command
title: Command
description: Command palette / ⌘K menu built on cmdk with fuzzy search.

name: confetti-button
title: Confetti Button
description: Button that fires a canvas confetti burst on click. Wraps the core Button component.

name: context-menu
title: Context Menu
description: Right-click context menu with items, checkboxes, radio groups, submenus, and shortcuts.

name: counter
title: Counter
description: Spring-animated number counter with IntersectionObserver trigger, easing, and prefix/suffix support.

name: cta-section
title: CTA Section
description: Full-width call-to-action section with radial gradient background, meteors, and dual CTA buttons.

name: cursor-trail
title: Cursor Trail
description: Full-page canvas cursor trail that leaves a fading particle stream. Fixed overlay, zero layout impact. Configurable color, size, trail length, and fade duration.

name: dashboard-analytics
title: Dashboard — Analytics
description: Analytics dashboard with metric cards, recent orders table, and top pages with progress bars.

name: data-table
title: Data Table
description: Fully featured data table with sorting, filtering, pagination, and row selection via TanStack Table v8.

name: date-picker
title: Date Picker
description: Calendar inside a Popover, triggered by a Button. Composable and accessible.

name: dialog
title: Dialog
description: Accessible modal dialog built on Radix UI with smooth enter/exit animations.

name: docs-site
title: Docs Site
description: Documentation shell with sticky top nav, sidebar navigation, main content area, on-page TOC, and footer.

name: dropdown-menu
title: Dropdown Menu
description: Accessible dropdown with items, checkboxes, radio groups, labels, and submenus.

name: electric-badge
title: Electric Badge
description: Animated badge with pulsing electric glow. Great for status indicators and labels.

name: faq
title: FAQ Section
description: Accordion-based FAQ section with configurable questions and answers.

name: feature-alternating
title: Feature — Alternating
description: Three alternating feature rows with code previews. Left-right layout flips on odd rows.

name: feature-grid
title: Feature Grid
description: Bento-style feature grid with glow cards, gradient text titles, and icon badges.

name: flip-card
title: Flip Card
description: 3D CSS flip card with front and back slots. Supports horizontal/vertical flip and hover/click trigger.

name: floating-dock
title: Floating Dock
description: macOS-style dock with spring-scale magnification on hover. Fully keyboard accessible.

name: footer
title: Footer
description: Three-column footer with brand tagline, link groups, legal links, and copyright.

name: form
title: Form
description: Form field wrappers integrating react-hook-form with accessible labels, descriptions, and error messages.

name: glitch-text
title: Glitch Text
description: Cyberpunk-style glitch effect with layered text-shadow offsets and random jitter keyframes.

name: globe
title: Globe
description: Canvas-rendered rotating dot globe with depth-based opacity. Zero external dependencies. Configurable size, dot color, spacing, and rotation speed.

name: glow-button
title: Glow Button
description: A button with a pulsing electric glow effect on hover.

name: glow-card
title: Glow Card
description: Card with cursor-tracked radial spotlight glow. Configurable color, size, and opacity.

name: glow-input
title: Glow Input
description: Input with animated gradient border and drop-shadow glow on focus. Drop-in replacement for Input.

name: gradient-card
title: Gradient Card
description: Card with animated border gradient and dark glass background.

name: gradient-text
title: Gradient Text
description: Animated gradient text with 5 variants: electric, aurora, fire, candy, and gold.

name: hero-centered
title: Hero — Centered
description: Full-width centered hero with gradient headline, typewriter subtitle, CTA buttons, beam separator, and optional meteor shower.

name: hero-split
title: Hero — Split
description: Two-column hero with headline and feature bullets on the left, animated code preview card on the right.

name: hover-card
title: Hover Card
description: Rich hover card for previewing content without navigating away.

name: how-it-works
title: How It Works
description: Three-step process section with numbered steps, icons, and a code snippet preview.

name: input
title: Input
description: Text input with OKLCH-tuned focus ring and surface hierarchy.

name: kbd
title: Kbd
description: Keyboard shortcut display with OS-aware symbols and elegant dark styling.

name: label
title: Label
description: Accessible form label built on Radix UI.

name: landing
title: Landing Page
description: Complete SaaS landing page: hero, logo cloud, alternating features, stats, testimonials, pricing, FAQ, CTA, and footer. Install one component, get everything.

name: letter-swap
title: Letter Swap
description: On hover, each letter scrambles through random characters before revealing the real letter. Configurable speed.

name: liquid-button
title: Liquid Button
description: Button with a liquid blob that follows the cursor using a radial gradient fill effect. Smooth mousemove tracking.

name: logo-cloud
title: Logo Cloud
description: Infinite-scroll marquee of brand logos. Two rows, mirrored direction.

name: map
title: Map
description: Dark-themed interactive map built on react-leaflet with CartoDB Dark Matter tiles, custom SVG cream markers, and popup labels.

name: magnetic-button
title: Magnetic Button
description: Button that elastically follows the cursor with a configurable magnetic strength. Snaps back on mouse leave.

name: marquee
title: Marquee
description: Infinite scroll marquee with configurable speed, direction, gap, and pause-on-hover.

name: meteors
title: Meteors
description: CSS-animated meteor shower effect. Drop into any relative-positioned container.

name: mono
title: Mono
description: Pure grayscale — zero chroma, maximum contrast. Timeless monochrome.

name: morphing-text
title: Morphing Text
description: Cycles through an array of words with a smooth blur-morph transition. Configurable interval and CSS-only animation.

name: navigation-menu
title: Navigation Menu
description: Accessible site navigation with dropdown panels, built on Radix UI.

name: neon-border
title: Neon Border
description: Card with a pulsing neon glow border. Configurable color. CSS box-shadow animation, no canvas required.

name: newsletter
title: Newsletter Section
description: Email signup section with glow card, input, and submit button.

name: noise-texture
title: Noise Texture
description: SVG fractal noise overlay that adds depth and premium feel to any surface.

name: number-flow
title: Number Flow
description: Smoothly animates between numeric values with digit-by-digit rolling animation. Supports prefix and suffix.

name: orbit-animation
title: Orbit Animation
description: CSS orbital rings with configurable items, radii, speeds, and reverse direction. Accepts any ReactNode as orbiting or center content.

name: pagination
title: Pagination
description: Page navigation control with previous, next, numbered pages, and ellipsis.

name: particle-hero
title: Particle Hero
description: Full-viewport hero section with animated canvas particle system, connect lines, and configurable electric color palette. Pro component.

name: popover
title: Popover
description: Floating popover panel anchored to a trigger, with smart collision detection.

name: pricing
title: Pricing Section
description: Three-tier pricing table with monthly/annual toggle, feature lists, and highlighted popular plan.

name: pricing-page
title: Pricing Page
description: Dedicated pricing page with a centered hero, three-tier pricing table, FAQ section, and CTA footer.

name: progress
title: Progress
description: Linear progress bar built on Radix UI with electric accent fill and glow.

name: radio-group
title: Radio Group
description: Radio group built on Radix UI with electric accent indicator.

name: resizable
title: Resizable
description: Draggable resize handles for panel layouts, built on react-resizable-panels.

name: retro-grid
title: Retro Grid
description: Animated perspective grid floor background with scrolling lines. Pure CSS, zero JS. Drop into any relative container.

name: ripple
title: Ripple Button
description: Button that fires an expanding ripple at the click position. Configurable ripple color.

name: rose
title: Rose
description: Warm rose/pink accent on deep garnet surfaces. Dramatic and editorial.

name: saas-dashboard
title: SaaS Dashboard
description: Analytics-focused dashboard with KPI stat cards and a detailed data table. Drop into any admin layout.

name: scroll-area
title: Scroll Area
description: Custom scrollbar overlay built on Radix UI. Consistent across browsers.

name: scroll-progress
title: Scroll Progress
description: Fixed-position thin progress bar showing how far the user has scrolled down the page. Configurable color and height.

name: scroll-reveal
title: Scroll Reveal
description: IntersectionObserver-powered fade-in wrapper. Configurable direction (up/down/left/right), distance, duration, delay, and once/repeat mode.

name: select
title: Select
description: Full-featured select built on Radix UI with keyboard navigation.

name: separator
title: Separator
description: Horizontal or vertical separator rule built on Radix UI.

name: settings-page
title: Settings Page
description: Settings layout with Profile, Security, Notifications, and Billing tabs.

name: sheet
title: Sheet
description: Slide-in panel from any edge — left, right, top, or bottom. Built on Radix Dialog.

name: shimmer-button
title: Shimmer Button
description: Button with rotating conic-gradient shimmer border effect. Three variants: default, filled, dark.

name: shimmer-text
title: Shimmer Text
description: Text with a moving shimmer highlight — great for hero headlines and loading states.

name: shine-border
title: Shine Border
description: Animated conic-gradient border with a multi-stop color sweep. Uses @property for smooth angle interpolation.

name: skeleton
title: Skeleton
description: Loading placeholder with subtle pulse animation.

name: slate
title: Slate
description: Cool blue-gray surfaces with an electric blue accent. The canonical dark-tech look.

name: slider
title: Slider
description: Range slider built on Radix UI with electric glow on the thumb.

name: sonner
title: Sonner
description: Toast notifications via Sonner with ParticleUI dark theme.

name: sparkles-text
title: Sparkles Text
description: Random sparkle SVG stars that appear and fade around your text. Configurable count, color, and speed.

name: spotlight
title: Spotlight
description: Card wrapper with a dual-layer radial spotlight that tracks the cursor. Drop-in replacement for GlowCard with a tighter, more intense beam.

name: spotlight-hero
title: Spotlight Hero
description: Hero section where a radial spotlight follows the user's cursor across a grid background.

name: stats
title: Stats Section
description: Animated metric counters on glow cards with a beam separator. Numbers animate on scroll.

name: switch
title: Switch
description: Toggle switch built on Radix UI with electric accent when checked.

name: table
title: Table
description: Styled HTML table with header, body, footer, row, head, and cell slots.

name: tabs
title: Tabs
description: Accessible tab panels built on Radix UI with keyboard navigation.

name: testimonials
title: Testimonials Section
description: Customer testimonial cards in a responsive grid with avatars and star ratings.

name: text-reveal
title: Text Reveal
description: Text revealed by a sliding mask on scroll entry. Clean clip-path animation, viewport-triggered.

name: text-shimmer
title: Text Shimmer
description: Light shimmer that sweeps across text. Configurable speed, color, and background. Pure CSS animation.

name: textarea
title: Textarea
description: Auto-resizable textarea with matching input design language.

name: tilt-card
title: Tilt Card
description: 3D perspective tilt card with cursor-tracked glare highlight. Pure CSS transforms, no dependencies.

name: tooltip
title: Tooltip
description: Lightweight tooltip built on Radix UI with smooth fade-in.

name: typewriter
title: Typewriter
description: Animated typewriter with configurable typing/deleting speed, pause, and loop. Electric cursor blink.

name: wave-text
title: Wave Text
description: Each character gets a staggered vertical wave animation. Configurable duration and amplitude. Pure CSS.

name: word-rotate
title: Word Rotate
description: Cycles through an array of words with a fade + slide animation. Supports static prefix and suffix text.

name: charts
title: Charts
description: Bar, line, area, and pie charts with OKLCH dark theme.

name: kanban
title: Kanban Board
description: Drag-and-drop kanban board with columns and cards.

name: event-calendar
title: Event Calendar
description: Full calendar with month, week, day, and agenda views.

name: file-uploader
title: File Uploader
description: Dropzone with file preview, progress, and validation.
